personal.name: Adamya Varshney
personal.title: Product Manager | AI & Agentic Products
personal.bio:
Hey 👋
I'm Adamya, a Product Manager with 3.5+ years across 0-to-N product development, GTM strategy, and marketing analytics. I've shipped end-to-end lifecycles — from MVP to market expansion — for B2B and D2C e-commerce, including digital journeys and Agentic AI solutions. I lead cross-functional teams toward quantifiable impact: 17% retention lifts, 3000+ new premium sellers, and AI products generating 100+ Cr in monthly revenue. I think customer-first, decide data-first, and love turning ambiguous problems into measurable outcomes.

current.degree: MBA, Majors in IT-Data Analytics & Marketing

previous.institution: Zakir Husain College of Engineering and Technology, A.M.U.

achievements: National Finalist at V-Guard Big Idea Business Plan Contest 2024 (competing against 2000+ product ideas with Aeromist)
2nd Runners-up in DASHBOARD WAR 3.0 at IIM Kashipur (Data Cleaning, Visualization & Analysis)
Gold Medal in IIM Kashipur's URP — 3-month consulting engagement for an NGO on Process & Learning Management

experience.description: Led seller growth and onboarding product initiatives. Drove 3000+ premium seller additions and contributed to AI products generating 100+ Cr monthly revenue.
Delivered end-to-end product lifecycles for B2B and D2C e-commerce clients. Improved retention by 17% through data-driven GTM and product strategy.

projects.title: Growmatic
projects.description: An AI-powered marketing copilot that generates personalised campaign briefs, copy, and channel strategies from a single product brief.

projects.title: Bundles & Buddy Mode
projects.description: A quick-commerce checkout concept introducing smart product bundles and a social "buddy mode" for split purchases.

images.alt: Bundles & Buddy Mode — quick-commerce checkout concept

projects.title: Xcurson
projects.description: An AI travel itinerary planner that builds day-by-day plans from natural language inputs, integrating maps, budgets, and booking links.

projects.title: Sam
projects.description: A LangGraph-powered AI chatbot with multi-step reasoning, tool use, and memory — built to explore agentic conversational patterns.

projects.title: Pocket
projects.description: An AI expense tracker that auto-categorises transactions, surfaces spending insights, and nudges users toward savings goals.

images.alt: Pocket — AI expense tracker with spending insights

projects.title: Diabetic Retinopathy Detection (CNN)
projects.description: A CNN model trained on retinal fundus images to classify diabetic retinopathy severity, achieving 87% accuracy on the APTOS dataset.

projects.title: IMDB Sentiment & Topic Analysis
projects.description: NLP pipeline combining VADER sentiment scoring with LDA topic modelling on 50 k IMDB reviews to surface genre-level opinion trends.

projects.title: Niyam (AI Fitness Coach)
projects.description: A conversational AI fitness coach that creates adaptive workout and nutrition plans, tracks progress, and adjusts programs week-over-week.

projects.title: Onset : Investment Platform
projects.description: A concept investment platform designed for first-time retail investors, simplifying portfolio building through guided onboarding and plain-language insights.

projects.title: Zomato : Farm Fresh
projects.description: A farm-to-table feature concept for Zomato enabling users to order fresh, locally sourced produce directly from partner farms with same-day delivery.

images.alt: Zomato Farm Fresh — farm-to-table feature concept

projects.title: OpenAI : Project TAGs
projects.description: A concept feature for ChatGPT Projects introducing tagging, smart filtering, and cross-project search to help power users organise large conversation libraries.

images.alt: OpenAI Project TAGs — ChatGPT Projects tagging concept

projects.title: LLM Fine-tuning : Llama Model on Custom Dataset
projects.description: Fine-tuned a Llama 3 model on a custom domain dataset using QLoRA, reducing hallucination rate by 34% on held-out evaluation prompts.

internship.availability: Available to start with a standard notice period
internship.goals: To own ambiguous 0-to-N product problems and build AI-native products that move real metrics.

funFacts: I built my first AI product in a weekend hackathon and it won
I can talk about product strategy and cricket with equal enthusiasm
I once reduced a 3-hour manual reporting process to 4 minutes with a Python script
personality.workingStyle: I work best at the intersection of ambiguity and data — I love taking a fuzzy problem, structuring it, validating with users, and shipping fast iterative solutions.
personality.motivation: Building products that genuinely improve people's lives at scale, especially at the frontier of AI.
